summary.zh: 涡轮增压引擎被彻底禁止，全场回归 3.5 升自然吸气组别；铃鹿赛道上普罗斯特与队友塞纳的相撞事件直接决定了冠军归属，成为 F1 历史上最富争议的收官战之一。
summary.en: Turbocharged engines were banned outright and the field returned to 3.5-litre naturally aspirated engines; a title-deciding collision between teammates Prost and Senna at Suzuka became one of the most contentious finales in F1 history.

content.zh: 涡轮增压引擎被彻底禁止，全场回归 3.5 升自然吸气组别；铃鹿赛道上普罗斯特与队友塞纳的相撞事件直接决定了冠军归属，成为 F1 历史上最富争议的收官战之一。
content.en: Turbocharged engines were banned outright and the field returned to 3.5-litre naturally aspirated engines; a title-deciding collision between teammates Prost and Senna at Suzuka became one of the most contentious finales in F1 history.
